segment.target: has nothing going on fr fr.
The ring is just vibing on .
On , the discs are literally just sitting there.

segment.source: Staring down from the heavens you see your followers finishing construction of the last of the great temples, ready to begin the work.
segment.target: No cap you're looking down from the cloud and your stans just finished building the last vibe shrine, ready to get this bread.

segment.source: You regard each of the temples in turn. On each is stacked the rings of stone.
segment.target: You peep each vibe shrine one by one. They got these thicc stone rings stacked up no cap.

segment.source: The priests far below construct a great harness, and after many years of work, the great stone ring is lifted up into the air, and swung over to the next of the temples.
segment.target: The simps way down there build this absolute unit of a harness, and after grinding for ages, the giant stone ring gets literally launched into the air and flung over to the next vibe shrine.

segment.source: The ropes are slashed, and in the blink of an eye it falls once more.
segment.target: They cut the ropes and it drops faster than your wifi on a Tuesday. Sheesh.

segment.source: Your next decree is met with a great feast and many sacrifices. After the funeary smoke has cleared, work to shift the great stone ring begins in earnest. A generation grows and falls, and the ring falls into its ordained place.
segment.target: Your next hot take goes viral and they throw a massive rager with tons of sacrifices. After the funeral smoke clears (RIP), they start grinding on moving the big rock donut for real. A whole generation gets born, lives, and gets ratio'd, and the ring finally lands where it's supposed to slay.

segment.source: Years pass as the ring is slowly moved.
segment.target: It's giving slow burn as the ring takes literally forever to move bestie.

segment.source: The priests below fight a war over what colour robes to wear, but while they fall and die, the work is still completed.
segment.target: The priests below start beefing over drip colors but even tho they're all catching L's and unaliving each other, the work still gets done somehow lmao.
